description_long: This is a tall, narrow shelving unit constructed from light-colored wood, featuring five open shelves with rounded front corners. The vertical sides and back panel are solid, providing structural support and stability. The shelves are evenly spaced, making the unit suitable for storing books, decorative items, or small urban essentials. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the piece a natural and contemporary appearance. The open design allows for easy access to items from the front, while the back remains closed for support. Its slim profile makes it ideal for placement in tight urban spaces such as hallways, entryways, or small offices.
description: A tall, slim, light wood shelving unit with five open, rounded shelves and a closed back, ideal for compact urban spaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full height and wood grain of the shelving unit, with no shelves visible.
description_view_1: Narrow edge view emphasizing the thin profile and vertical structure, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Front view displaying all five open shelves with rounded fronts and the closed back panel.
description_view_3: Angled view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the alternating open spaces.
